headline: 2 S&P 500 Stocks to Target This Week and 1 We Brush Off
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.

headline: Is Cardinal Health (CAH) a Great Value Stock Right Now?
summary: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.

raw.headline: Is Cardinal Health (CAH) a Great Value Stock Right Now?

headline: Is Cardinal (CAH) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Cardinal (CAH) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Best Dividend Aristocrats: May 2026
summary: The Dividend Aristocrats underperformed SPY YTD, returning 3.34% versus SPY's 10.39%, though 22 Aristocrats still posted double-digit gains.
